condition.title: Unconscious
condition.description: The character is unconscious and cannot act. They wake when healed above 0 hit points, or at the GM's discretion.

condition.title: Major Wound
condition.description: The character suffered damage equal to or greater than half their hit points in a single blow. Make a CON x 5 roll or fall unconscious; injury effects persist until fully healed.

condition.title: Dying
condition.description: The character is at 0 hit points and bleeding out. They lose 1 hit point per round until stabilised (successful First Aid) or fall to -HP, at which point they die.

condition.title: Temporary Insanity
condition.description: The character failed a Sanity roll and is temporarily insane. Roll on the Temporary Insanity table; effects last 1d10 rounds or until the GM decides.

condition.title: Indefinite Insanity
condition.description: The character lost 20% or more of their current Sanity in a single incident and is indefinitely insane. Roll on the Indefinite Insanity table; recovery requires extended care.
